basics.name: Mohd Shahid Sharif Sayyed
basics.label: Full Stack Developer
basics.summary: Aspiring software developer with a strong focus on backend development, Android and AI applications. Skilled in Python and Java with hands-on experience in creating applications using FastAPI for AI MCP.

work.summary: Worked on meta developer tools using Instagram by integrating Meta APIs and created an Instagram chatbot. Created automation using FastAPI for updating endpoints in the database.
highlights: Integrated Meta APIs for Instagram chatbot functionality
Built FastAPI automation for database endpoint updates
Developed custom tools supporting AI model interaction using MCP

work.summary: Built backend services using FastAPI in Python for AI-based applications and developed custom tools supporting AI model interaction using MCP.
highlights: Built backend services using FastAPI in Python
Developed custom MCP tools for AI model interaction
Created REST APIs and handled request/response workflows

projects.name: Pixel Fire — 2D Platformer
projects.description: A 2D Indie Platformer built in Python using the PyGame library. Includes multiple levels and stages with unique Boss Fights. The game world was constructed using Sprites and a Level Builder, creating an immersive environment. Showcases game loop management, collision detection, and sprite animation.

projects.name: Space Defenders — 2D Arcade
projects.description: A 2D arcade-style game where two players can play together on the same keyboard. Each player controls a spaceship and tries to shoot the other while avoiding being hit. Design inspired by classic retro arcade games.

projects.name: Blood Community — Android App
projects.description: An Android app that connects blood donors directly with requesters, bypassing the need for a blood bank intermediary. Built with Android Studio using Java for the front-end, and PHP with MySQL for the backend.

projects.name: Fans Selling Website
projects.description: A simple e-commerce style website for browsing fans with details like price and description, and an order form. Built as a first web project exercise.
